content: WCAG 2.2 Level AA is the accepted legal/professional baseline. Key: visible focus indicator on all keyboard-operable UI (2.4.7); focus indicator >=3:1 contrast against unfocused state and adjacent colors; text contrast 4.5:1 (3:1 for large text), non-text UI elements 3:1; full keyboard navigability. Dark themes must be tested explicitly - low-contrast gray hint text on near-black commonly fails. New 2.2 criteria include focus-not-obscured, target size minimum (24px), and consistent help placement.
